title: Internal error when assigning a hierarchical reference of an interface to a wire

features.name: hierarchical interface reference in parameterized module
features.description: Code should include a hierarchical reference to an interface instance inside a parameterized module that is instantiated with a non-default parameter value

features.name: interface to wire assignment via hierarchical path
features.description: Code should include an assignment of a hierarchical interface reference to a wire in a context where the parent module has a parameter mismatch
